data.title: Bitget Wallet launches BGB staking with a fixed annualized yield of 5%.
data.description: Bitget Wallet has officially launched BGB staking, the first periodic staking product for holders of the new version of BGB (CCIP version). The initial total pool size is 2 million BGB, with a maximum staking of 20,000 BGB per address. Subscription will automatically close once the limit is reached, on a first-come, first-served basis. The product offers a fixed annualized return of 5%, with a 90-day lock-up period. Returns are paid daily, and both principal and returns can be claimed upon maturity. If users do not manually unstake and claim their returns after 90 days, no further returns will be generated. As a new product in Bitget Wallet's cryptocurrency-based wealth management section, BGB Staking aims to provide long-term BGB holders with a reliable on-chain return channel, while enhancing the stability of the BGB ecosystem through the lock-up mechanism, and promoting the expansion of on-chain asset management towards stable and sustainable daily use cases.

data.title: Binance Square Launches PIXEL Reward Campaign on CreatorPad
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad is set to offer 15,000,000 PIXEL rewards to verified users who complete specific tasks. The activity period runs from 2026-04-14 09:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-28 23:59 (UTC), with token voucher rewards distributed before 2026-05-20.

Participants can join the campaign by clicking 'Join now' on the activity page and completing tasks to earn points and rank on the leaderboard. Tasks include creating posts on Binance Square with a minimum of 100 characters about the project, using the hashtag #pixel, tagging $PIXEL token, and mentioning the project’s Square account Pixels (@Pixels). Additionally, users must follow Pixels’ account on Binance Square and social media and trade a minimum of $10 equivalent in PIXEL in a single transaction.

Eligible users will earn points for each completed task, determining their rank on the leaderboard. The reward structure allocates 7,500,000 PIXEL to the top 500 creators on the PIXEL Global Project Leaderboard and another 7,500,000 PIXEL to the top 500 eligible Chinese creators. The leaderboard data is displayed with a T+2 delay, and the snapshot date for calculating points is 2026-04-28.

Users must complete account verification (KYC) to receive rewards, and those identified as risk users within seven days after the activity ends will be ineligible. Participants must keep their campaign-related posts published for at least 30 days after the activity ends. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who violate guidelines or tamper with program code. The platform also retains the right to amend terms and conditions without prior notice.

data.title: Jito Foundation Expands JitoSOL Access in South Korea
data.description: The Jito Foundation has announced plans to collaborate with South Korean digital asset custodian KODA to enhance institutional access to JitoSOL in the Korean market. According to Foresight News, this partnership aims to broaden the reach and availability of JitoSOL, facilitating greater engagement from institutional investors in South Korea.

data.title: Errol Musk Advocates for Cryptocurrency as the Future of Finance
data.description: Errol Musk has expressed his belief that cryptocurrency represents the future of finance, highlighting its advantages over traditional banking systems. According to NS3.AI, he claimed that his sons, Elon Musk and Kimbal Musk, hold 23,400 BTC. Errol Musk emphasized the efficiency of crypto payments, noting their ability to move across borders more swiftly than conventional bank transactions. He also shared his personal experience of receiving payment in Solana, underscoring the practical benefits of digital currencies.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of a diplomatic meeting between the US and Iran before April 18 has risen to 54%, a 27% increase over the past 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, the probability of a diplomatic meeting between the US and Iran before April 18th has risen to 54%, a 27% increase in 24 hours. Furthermore, the probability of a diplomatic meeting before April 30th has risen to 94%, a 22% increase in 24 hours. The event's contractual rules define a diplomatic meeting as a formal meeting where representatives of the US and Iran, in official capacity and authorized to represent their respective governments, negotiate or conduct diplomatic activities regarding US-Iran relations. Indirect meetings, such as those conducted through designated mediators, coordinators, or dialogue partners with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, also fall under the category of diplomatic meetings. The Pakistani Foreign Ministry has invited the US and Iran to Islamabad for a second round of negotiations. The date and time for the second round of US-Iran negotiations have not yet been determined. In addition, Iranian Deputy Interior Minister Ali Zenivand stated on the 13th that US President Trump's remarks about "destroying" Iranian civilization were a "joke," and that "those who do not understand Iranian civilization cannot appreciate its power." Odaily Seer continuously focuses on the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: BIT: Coinbase's Bitcoin premium has rebounded to a near six-month high, potentially reflecting a recovery in US buying.
data.description: Analyst Markus Thielen stated that the recent rebound of the Coinbase Bitcoin premium to its highest level since October 2025 indicates improved buying interest in the US market, suggesting that some institutional funds may have re-entered the market. Data shows that the current BTC price on the Coinbase platform is consistently higher than on other exchanges, reflecting signs of a recovery in demand. Previously, the premium had turned into a discount, which was interpreted by the market as weak sentiment; the return to the premium range may indicate a gradual stabilization in demand. Furthermore, as of mid-April, Bitcoin ETFs continued their monthly net inflow trend; if this trend continues, it could further strengthen the signal of a recovery in liquidity.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Shanghai Futures Exchange Adjusts Margin Requirements for Gold and Silver Contracts
data.description: Shanghai Futures Exchange announced changes to margin requirements for gold and silver futures contracts on April 14. According to Jin10, the exchange set the price limit for the gold AU2607 contract at 17%, with a hedging margin ratio of 18% and a general margin ratio of 19%. For the silver AG2704 contract, the price limit is set at 20%, with a hedging margin ratio of 21% and a general margin ratio of 22%.

data.title: U.S.-Iran Diplomatic Meeting Probabilities Rise
data.description:
The likelihood of a diplomatic meeting between the United States and Iran before April 18 has increased to 54%, marking a 27% rise in the past 24 hours. According to Odaily, the probability of such a meeting occurring before April 30 has also surged to 94%, with a 22% increase over the same period.

The contract rules for this event define a diplomatic meeting as an official gathering where representatives from the U.S. and Iran, authorized by their respective governments, engage in negotiations or diplomatic activities concerning U.S.-Iran relations. Meetings conducted indirectly, such as through designated mediators or coordinators with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, also fall under the category of diplomatic meetings.

The Pakistani Foreign Ministry has extended an invitation to the U.S. and Iran to hold a second round of talks in Islamabad. However, the date and time for these negotiations have not yet been confirmed. Additionally, on the 13th, Iran's Deputy Interior Minister Ali Zainivand commented on U.S. President Donald Trump's remarks about 'destroying' Iranian civilization, dismissing them as a 'joke' and stating that those unfamiliar with Iranian civilization cannot appreciate its strength.

data.title: The address suspected of controlling Binance's "Life" token has increased its holdings to 147 million tokens, representing 14.67% of the total supply.
data.description: According to crypto analyst EmberCN, approximately 87.85 million Binance Life tokens (worth about $14.93 million USD) were transferred out of Binance through nine wallets from suspected related addresses, causing the price of Binance Life to rise by about 59%. Currently, the suspected related addresses hold approximately 146.7 million Binance Life tokens on-chain, representing about 14.67% of the total supply, with a corresponding value of about $39.8 million USD.

data.title: Global Fund Managers Survey: Mixed Expectations for Central Bank Policies
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Bank of America among global fund managers reveals diverse expectations regarding central bank policies. According to Jin10, 58% of investors anticipate that the U.S. Federal Reserve will cut interest rates within the next 12 months. Meanwhile, 46% of investors expect the European Central Bank to raise interest rates during the same period. These findings highlight the varying outlooks on monetary policy adjustments in major economies.

data.title: Bitget launches CFD copy trading with a minimum investment of 50 USDT.
data.description: Bitget officially launched its CFD copy trading feature today, expanding its copy trading service to the forex, gold, crude oil, and stock index markets. Against the backdrop of increased global macroeconomic volatility and rising demand for cross-asset allocation among crypto users, Bitget's CFD business has recently surpassed $6 billion in daily trading volume. This new feature utilizes the platform's mature copy trading framework, allowing users to follow professional traders' strategies with a minimum investment of only 50 USDT, further lowering the barrier for ordinary users to participate in traditional financial markets. At the product level, CFD copy trading is deeply integrated with the MT5 infrastructure, automating account opening and withdrawal processes with an overall processing time of less than 3 seconds. In terms of mechanism, Bitget adopts a high-water mark (HWM) profit-sharing rule, distributing profits only to the copy trader's new earnings, ensuring fair and transparent profit distribution. Qualified traders can receive up to 30% of the profits. Core data is updated hourly, and profits are settled daily, further guaranteeing the transparency and traceability of the overall execution.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stock Market Closes Higher with Consumer Sector Rebound
data.description: The Hong Kong stock market closed with gains, as the Hang Seng Index rose by 0.82% and the Hang Seng Tech Index increased by 0.62%. According to Jin10, the consumer sector showed signs of recovery, with notable performances from companies such as Shanghai Auntie (02589.HK), which surged by 7.5%, and Pop Mart (09992.HK), which climbed by 6.5%.

data.title: Iranian officials: Trump's remarks about "destroying" Iranian civilization are a "joke".
data.description: Iranian Deputy Interior Minister Ali Zenivand said on the 13th that US President Trump's remarks about "destroying" Iranian civilization were a "joke," adding that "those who do not understand Iranian civilization cannot grasp its power." Zenivand said that Iran has established command posts in the northwest and southeast, and its armed forces are monitoring every movement along the border with "absolute superiority." (Xinhua)

data.title: Solana Ecosystem App Founder Faces Charges in New York Court
data.description: SolanaFloor reports that the founder of Solana ecosystem application Believe, Pasternak, is facing charges in a New York court. According to Foresight News, Pasternak is accused of involvement in a crypto rug pull scheme, which resulted in millions of dollars in losses.

data.title: Iran Criticizes U.S. President Trump's Remarks on Iranian Civilization
data.description: Iran's Deputy Interior Minister, Ali Zolnivand, criticized U.S. President Donald Trump's comments about "destroying" Iranian civilization, calling them a "joke." According to Odaily, Zolnivand stated that those unfamiliar with Iranian civilization cannot appreciate its strength. He also mentioned that Iran has established command centers in the northwest and southeast, with armed forces monitoring every movement along the borders with "absolute superiority."

data.title: Vietnam Central Bank to Closely Monitor Gold Market Amid Global Uncertainty
data.description: Vietnam's central bank officials have announced plans to closely monitor the domestic gold market in light of the current global situation. According to Jin10, the decision comes as uncertainties in the international arena continue to impact economic stability. The central bank aims to ensure that fluctuations in gold prices do not adversely affect the country's financial system. This move reflects Vietnam's proactive approach to safeguarding its economy against potential external shocks.

data.title: ZAMA shares surged over 30% in a short period following news of its Upbit integration.
data.description: Market data shows that ZAMA rose by about 30% in a short period of time after the news of its listing on Upbit, and is currently trading at $0.0306.

data.title: The IRS is tightening its oversight of encrypted tax matters as filing deadlines approach.
data.description: The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) is intensifying its oversight of tax compliance for crypto assets, with enforcement actions tightening as the April 15th filing deadline approaches. A report shows that approximately 61% of US crypto investors are unaware of the new filing rules for the 2025 tax year, and about 52% are concerned about penalties for incorrect filings. The new rules require brokers to report digital asset trading revenue to the IRS for the first time using Form 1099-DA, but the cost basis still needs to be calculated by the investors themselves. Industry insiders say that the current regulatory environment is becoming increasingly stringent, and investors need to fully record transaction and wallet data and report accurately to avoid potential legal risks. (DL News)

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Licensing Strategy and Industry Development Insights
data.description:
Livio Weng, CEO of New Fire Group, recently shared insights on Hong Kong's stablecoin licensing and industry development during an interview with Phoenix TV. According to Foresight News, Weng described the regulatory approach as prudent and reasonable, aiming to prevent resource dispersion and enhance the certainty of compliant project development. He emphasized the urgent need for the Hong Kong dollar stablecoin sector to seize opportunities for rapid advancement.

Despite controversy surrounding the issuance of two stablecoin licenses from 36 applicants, Weng believes the cautious regulatory decision is beneficial. Successful stablecoin implementation relies on large-scale application and ecosystem collaboration, and excessive licensing could lead to inefficient competition and hinder overall industry growth. Currently, over 80% of global stablecoin market share is dominated by USDT and USDC, and Hong Kong's "2 vs 2" framework offers strategic insights. New Fire Group has experienced significant customer growth in the past six months, with many clients expressing interest in stablecoin-related services. Consequently, the group plans to establish stablecoin trading and asset management operations in the near future.

Weng also highlighted the transformative potential of AI Agents, which he views as historical products that will fundamentally reshape productivity. Stablecoins are considered the most natural financial primitives for AI Agents. The development of AI Agents will occur in three stages, initially serving as human assistants characterized by high-frequency, small-scale, 24/7 interactions. Traditional banking and SWIFT systems may struggle to support these interactions, making stablecoins the most suitable payment tool, leading to explosive adoption and global expansion. In the stage of equal cooperation with humans, AI Agents may prefer decentralized native tokens like Bitcoin. In a distant hypothetical scenario, AI could even issue its own currency. Overall, AI Agents are expected to be a key force driving the large-scale application of stablecoins for an extended period.

data.title: U.S. and Iranian Teams to Resume Peace Talks in Islamabad
data.description: Negotiating teams from the United States and Iran are scheduled to return to Islamabad, Pakistan, later this week to continue peace discussions. According to NS3.AI, four sources have confirmed the upcoming talks, which aim to address ongoing diplomatic issues between the two nations. The resumption of dialogue follows previous rounds of negotiations that have sought to find common ground and resolve tensions.
